MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Paul Herp, Esq. 415-227-2300 Law Offices of Douglas MacKay moving party.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Mr. Herp argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Law Offices of Douglas MacKay, Paul A Herp's Motion to be relieved as Counsel for Defendant Mario Leuce.

Granted. Mr Herp to resubmit a proposed order to the Court. The proposed order that was lodged with the papers was not filled out completely.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
